idea-plugin.name: Claude Code For JetBrains
idea-plugin.description: Native graphical Claude Code client for JetBrains IDEs. Drives the local claude binary over its stream-json protocol and exposes the full Claude Code surface as a rich GUI: streaming chat, multi-prompt queueing while the agent works, the complete slash-command palette, model / effort / permission-mode / thinking menus, MCP, agents, context & cost views, and native diff review for file edits. No terminal required.
